description: Synthetic local-only second-brain corpus with paraphrases, graded relevance, workspace distractors, superseded decisions, and a deleted draft.

documents.title: Atlas production deployment
documents.text: Project Atlas production deployment runs in AWS region ap-northeast-2. The release command is uv run deploy --region ap-northeast-2. Change ticket Atlas-431 records the migration.

documents.title: Atlas release ownership
documents.text: Mina owns the Project Atlas release checklist and production readiness review. Joon is the backup reviewer when Mina is unavailable.

documents.title: Atlas database backup policy
documents.text: Project Atlas PostgreSQL backups are retained for 14 days. Automated snapshots begin daily at 02:30 UTC and restore drills run each quarter.

documents.title: Atlas API resilience policy
documents.text: The Atlas public API client allows three total attempts. Retry delays are 200 milliseconds and then 800 milliseconds. Do not retry validation errors.

documents.title: Atlas service objectives
documents.text: Project Atlas targets 99.9 percent monthly availability. The production request latency objective keeps p95 below 350 milliseconds.

documents.title: Atlas restart runbook
documents.text: For an Atlas recovery, restart the gateway first, wait for health checks, and restart workers second. This order is part of release readiness.

documents.title: Old Atlas package manager decision
documents.text: Project Atlas package manager decision: use pip and requirements.txt for all developer commands.

documents.title: Current Atlas package manager decision
documents.text: Project Atlas package manager decision: use uv with uv.lock. This replaces the former pip and requirements.txt workflow.

documents.title: Deleted Atlas region draft
documents.text: Draft only: move Project Atlas production deployment to us-east-1 under change ticket Atlas-431. This proposal was withdrawn.

documents.title: Borealis production deployment
documents.text: Project Borealis production deployment runs in AWS region eu-west-1. Its migration ticket is Borealis-882.

documents.title: Borealis release ownership
documents.text: Mina audits the Borealis release checklist, but Pavel owns its production readiness decision.

documents.title: Status report preference
documents.text: I prefer concise Korean status reports that end with concrete next actions.

documents.title: Scheduling timezone preference
documents.text: Use Asia/Seoul as my default timezone for schedules and date interpretation.

documents.title: Atlas release evidence
documents.text: Atlas production readiness requires the release checklist, a successful restore drill, and healthy gateway checks before workers restart.
